title: callista longicornis
intro: Callista longicornis, also known as the long-horned snail shell tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Callista longicornis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce cholesterol. In herbal preparations, Callista longicornis is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
